  Singleton allocation of metric license capacity into named pools that match metrics by label filter, each with priority-based dropping when the pool's allocation is exceeded.

# chronosphere_resource_pools_config (Resource)

Singleton allocation of metric license capacity into named pools that match metrics by label filter, each with priority-based dropping when the pool's allocation is exceeded.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `default_pool` (Block List, Max: 1) Catch-all pool that receives metrics not matched by any other pool. Also receives any license allocation left unassigned by the other pools. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--default_pool))
- `pool` (Block List, Max: 128) Named pools that partition each license across teams or workloads. Pools are matched in declaration order via their `match_rules`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--pool))
- `pools` (Block List, Max: 128, Deprecated) Deprecated: use `pool` instead. Set of named pools that partition the license. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--pools))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedblock--default_pool"></a>
### Nested Schema for `default_pool`

Optional:

- `allocation` (Block List, Max: 1) License allocation for the pool. Can be expressed as a percentage of the license (`percent_of_license`) or as per-license fixed values (`fixed_value`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--default_pool--allocation))
- `priorities` (Block List, Max: 1) Optional high/low priority sub-classifications within the pool. Low-priority metrics are dropped first; high-priority metrics are dropped last when limits are hit. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--default_pool--priorities))
- `priority_thresholds` (Block List) Per-license drop thresholds for `PERSISTED_CARDINALITY_STANDARD` and `PERSISTED_CARDINALITY_HISTOGRAM` only. Defines strict upper bounds beyond which new consumption is dropped, optionally segmented by priority class. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--default_pool--priority_thresholds))

<a id="nestedblock--default_pool--allocation"></a>
### Nested Schema for `default_pool.allocation`

Optional:

- `fixed_value` (Block List) Per-license fixed allocations that override `percent_of_license` for the named licenses. When any pool sets a fixed value for a license, every pool must also set one for that license. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--default_pool--allocation--fixed_value))
- `percent_of_license` (Number) Percent of each license to allocate to this pool, between 0 and 100. Across non-default pools, the sum must not exceed 100; the default pool receives the remainder.
- `priority_thresholds` (Block List) Per-license drop thresholds for `PERSISTED_CARDINALITY_STANDARD` and `PERSISTED_CARDINALITY_HISTOGRAM` only. Defines strict upper bounds beyond which new consumption is dropped, optionally segmented by priority class. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--default_pool--allocation--priority_thresholds))

<a id="nestedblock--default_pool--allocation--fixed_value"></a>
### Nested Schema for `default_pool.allocation.fixed_value`

Required:

- `license` (String) License this fixed-value allocation applies to (e.g. `PERSISTED_WRITES`).
- `value` (Number) Fixed amount of the license to allocate, in the license's native unit.


<a id="nestedblock--default_pool--allocation--priority_thresholds"></a>
### Nested Schema for `default_pool.allocation.priority_thresholds`

Required:

- `license` (String) License the thresholds apply to.

Optional:

- `all_priorities` (Block List, Max: 1) Threshold value, expressed as either a percent of the pool's allocation or as a fixed value in license units. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--default_pool--allocation--priority_thresholds--all_priorities))
- `default_and_low_priority` (Block List, Max: 1) Threshold value, expressed as either a percent of the pool's allocation or as a fixed value in license units. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--default_pool--allocation--priority_thresholds--default_and_low_priority))
- `low_priority` (Block List, Max: 1) Threshold value, expressed as either a percent of the pool's allocation or as a fixed value in license units. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--default_pool--allocation--priority_thresholds--low_priority))

<a id="nestedblock--default_pool--allocation--priority_thresholds--all_priorities"></a>
### Nested Schema for `default_pool.allocation.priority_thresholds.all_priorities`

Optional:

- `fixed_value` (Number) Threshold expressed as a fixed value of the license, in the license's native unit.
- `percent_of_pool_allocation` (Number) Threshold as a percent of the pool's allocation. `100` equals the full allocation; values above 100 allow the pool to exceed its baseline allocation.


<a id="nestedblock--default_pool--allocation--priority_thresholds--default_and_low_priority"></a>
### Nested Schema for `default_pool.allocation.priority_thresholds.default_and_low_priority`

Optional:

- `fixed_value` (Number) Threshold expressed as a fixed value of the license, in the license's native unit.
- `percent_of_pool_allocation` (Number) Threshold as a percent of the pool's allocation. `100` equals the full allocation; values above 100 allow the pool to exceed its baseline allocation.


<a id="nestedblock--default_pool--allocation--priority_thresholds--low_priority"></a>
### Nested Schema for `default_pool.allocation.priority_thresholds.low_priority`

Optional:

- `fixed_value` (Number) Threshold expressed as a fixed value of the license, in the license's native unit.
- `percent_of_pool_allocation` (Number) Threshold as a percent of the pool's allocation. `100` equals the full allocation; values above 100 allow the pool to exceed its baseline allocation.




<a id="nestedblock--default_pool--priorities"></a>
### Nested Schema for `default_pool.priorities`

Optional:

- `high_priority_match_rules` (List of String) Matchers selecting metrics within the pool that should be treated as high priority and dropped last.
- `low_priority_match_rules` (List of String) Matchers selecting metrics within the pool that should be treated as low priority and dropped first.


<a id="nestedblock--default_pool--priority_thresholds"></a>
### Nested Schema for `default_pool.priority_thresholds`

Required:

- `license` (String) License the thresholds apply to.

Optional:

- `all_priorities` (Block List, Max: 1) Threshold value, expressed as either a percent of the pool's allocation or as a fixed value in license units. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--default_pool--priority_thresholds--all_priorities))
- `default_and_low_priority` (Block List, Max: 1) Threshold value, expressed as either a percent of the pool's allocation or as a fixed value in license units. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--default_pool--priority_thresholds--default_and_low_priority))
- `low_priority` (Block List, Max: 1) Threshold value, expressed as either a percent of the pool's allocation or as a fixed value in license units. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--default_pool--priority_thresholds--low_priority))

<a id="nestedblock--default_pool--priority_thresholds--all_priorities"></a>
### Nested Schema for `default_pool.priority_thresholds.all_priorities`

Optional:

- `fixed_value` (Number) Threshold expressed as a fixed value of the license, in the license's native unit.
- `percent_of_pool_allocation` (Number) Threshold as a percent of the pool's allocation. `100` equals the full allocation; values above 100 allow the pool to exceed its baseline allocation.


<a id="nestedblock--default_pool--priority_thresholds--default_and_low_priority"></a>
### Nested Schema for `default_pool.priority_thresholds.default_and_low_priority`

Optional:

- `fixed_value` (Number) Threshold expressed as a fixed value of the license, in the license's native unit.
- `percent_of_pool_allocation` (Number) Threshold as a percent of the pool's allocation. `100` equals the full allocation; values above 100 allow the pool to exceed its baseline allocation.


<a id="nestedblock--default_pool--priority_thresholds--low_priority"></a>
### Nested Schema for `default_pool.priority_thresholds.low_priority`

Optional:

- `fixed_value` (Number) Threshold expressed as a fixed value of the license, in the license's native unit.
- `percent_of_pool_allocation` (Number) Threshold as a percent of the pool's allocation. `100` equals the full allocation; values above 100 allow the pool to exceed its baseline allocation.




<a id="nestedblock--pool"></a>
### Nested Schema for `pool`

Required:

- `name` (String) Unique name of the pool.

Optional:

- `allocation` (Block List, Max: 1) License allocation for the pool. Can be expressed as a percentage of the license (`percent_of_license`) or as per-license fixed values (`fixed_value`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--pool--allocation))
- `match_rule` (String, Deprecated) Deprecated: use `match_rules` instead. Single matcher selecting metrics that belong to this pool.
- `match_rules` (List of String) Matchers selecting metrics that map to this pool. A metric matching any rule is assigned to the pool.
- `priorities` (Block List, Max: 1) Optional high/low priority sub-classifications within the pool. Low-priority metrics are dropped first; high-priority metrics are dropped last when limits are hit. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--pool--priorities))

<a id="nestedblock--pool--allocation"></a>
### Nested Schema for `pool.allocation`

Optional:

- `fixed_value` (Block List) Per-license fixed allocations that override `percent_of_license` for the named licenses. When any pool sets a fixed value for a license, every pool must also set one for that license. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--pool--allocation--fixed_value))
- `percent_of_license` (Number) Percent of each license to allocate to this pool, between 0 and 100. Across non-default pools, the sum must not exceed 100; the default pool receives the remainder.
- `priority_thresholds` (Block List) Per-license drop thresholds for `PERSISTED_CARDINALITY_STANDARD` and `PERSISTED_CARDINALITY_HISTOGRAM` only. Defines strict upper bounds beyond which new consumption is dropped, optionally segmented by priority class. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--pool--allocation--priority_thresholds))
